questionHtml: Use Euler’s method with a step length of 0.5 minutes to estimate the maximum value of H.
markschemeHtml:
evidence of using Euler’s method correctly

e.g. y1=1.05545…               (A1)

maximum value of H=1.45 (metres) (at 8.5 minutes)             A2

(1.44678… metres)

 

[3 marks]
